description: Machine-readable index of every module in the Themes Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase — it tells you exactly where to look for any given concern.

themes.purpose: Frappe custom app for site-wide CSS theming

entry_points.hooks.py: Frappe app metadata, CSS/JS loading (nce_theme.css + theme-swatch-picker), SPA routing, Apps screen entry, after_install
entry_points.api.py: Whitelisted API: get_theme_editor(), get_base_theme_payload(), save_theme(), save_as_base_theme(), create_theme(), list_themes(), rename_theme(), delete_theme()
entry_points.install.py: after_install hook: Site Theme Config + NCE Theme Default on fresh install
entry_points.init_theme.py: One-time init script: ensure NCE Theme Default exists and publish CSS. Run via bench execute.
entry_points.patches/v1_0/migrate_theme_settings_to_n: Post-migrate patch: legacy Theme Settings → NCE Theme Default
entry_points.patches/v1_0/collapse_theme_versions_to_: Copy legacy Theme Version JSON onto NCE Theme.theme_json
entry_points.patches/v1_0/remove_legacy_theme_doctype: Drop Theme Version and Theme Settings from database

utils.utils/theme_color_utils.py: Color math helpers: OKLCH shade generation, _effective_role_hex (gamma-aware 600 stop), shadow building, token maps (BORDER_RADIUS_MAP, etc.)
utils.utils/css_writer.py: CSS generation and publish: generate_css(), generate_site_css(), publish_theme(), TOKEN_FIELDS
utils.utils/bundle_base_theme.py: bundle_base_theme_to_app() — write base_theme.json + default_theme.py for new installs
utils.data/base_theme.json: Bundled base theme payload (updated by save_as_base_theme)
utils.utils/default_theme.py: Default token payload for new NCE Theme installs

doctypes.themes/doctype/nce_theme/: Theme registry + definition: theme_name, slug, is_default, status, theme_json.
doctypes.themes/doctype/site_theme_config/: Single: base_theme, css_hash; on_update publishes CSS.

static_files.public/dist/: ThemeSwatchPicker widget build output (committed: theme-swatch-picker.umd.js/css/es.js; rebuild with npm run build:widget in frontend/)
static_files.public/frontend/: Vue SPA build output (regenerated by Vite)

pages.themes/page/site_theme_switch/: Desk Page redirect → Site Theme Config form

frontend.purpose: Vue 3 SPA for theme configuration and preview

key_files.src/router.ts: Vue Router config — maps /themes/* paths to page components

pages.src/pages/ThemeSettingsPage.vue: Main theme configuration UI (tabbed: Colors, Typography, Layout, Advanced)
pages.src/pages/HomePage.vue: Landing page with links to settings and preview

composables.src/composables/useTheme.ts: Loads active theme via get_active_theme_editor API and applies CSS vars

components.src/components/BrandColorPicker.vue: Brand color picker with swatch presets
components.src/components/SwatchPicker.vue: Hex color swatch picker for theme editor
components.src/components/ThemeSwatchPicker.vue: Headless Vue wrapper — picks theme-{kind}-{role}-{shade} class strings. Agent: Vue hosts MUST pass :set-field/:get-field to reactive formData (not inject alone) or save will not persist — see docs/theme-swatch-picker.md §8.1

widget.src/widget/constants.ts: Roles, kinds, curated shades — mirrors css_writer.py
widget.src/widget/theme-swatch-picker.css: Widget modal layout styles (backdrop z-index 10000 blocks host form)
widget.src/widget/blocked-dialog.ts: User-facing msgprint when Theme missing or Inactive (no modal open)
widget.src/widget/adapters/desk-adapter.ts: Frappe Desk frm integration — resolveNceThemeSlug (Link → slug), frm.set_value on pick
widget.src/widget/adapters/standalone-adapter.t: Plain DOM field integration (themeFieldEl value must be slug)
widget.vite.widget.config.js: Vite library build → themes/public/dist/ (gitignored; run npm run build:widget)

utilities.tailwind.config.js: Maps Tailwind utilities to --nce-* CSS tokens

nce_events.desk: Page Panel form — Colours tab (page_panel.js) calls frappe.ui.themeSwatchPicker.open({ frm, themeField: 'theme', valueField }) for eight chrome slots: frame_bg_class, header_bg_class, footer_bg_class, col_header_bg_class, filter_bar_bg_class, row_bg_class, row_alt_bg_class, dialog_header_bg_class
nce_events.runtime: panel_page_v2 — panelChromeClasses.js resolves slots → theme-bg-* on PanelFloat, PanelTable, PanelTableFilterBar, PanelFormDialog (viewer dialog scoped to opening panel)

architecture_notes: Theme uses CSS custom properties (--nce-*) injected as :root vars (default) plus [data-nce-theme="slug"] scoped blocks per Active theme — downstream apps consume via var() or data-nce-theme scoping
Theme CSS is loaded site-wide via app_include_css in hooks.py
Vue SPA is served at /themes/* routes via www/themes.html
ThemeSwatchPicker Desk: themeField = NCE Theme Link doc name → resolveNceThemeSlug before data-nce-theme; empty/invalid theme → blocked-dialog, no modal
ThemeSwatchPicker while open: slug cached at open time; backdrop blocks host form (no watchThemeSlug)
theme-bg-* classes auto-pair foreground (color: var(--nce-*-fg)) — consumers should not hardcode theme-text-primary-fg on children inside a dynamic bg surface

ThemeSwatchPicker Vue embed: pass :set-field/:get-field to host formData — Desk uses frm.set_value via desk-adapter.ts; Vue wrapper does not. See docs/theme-swatch-picker.md §8.1. Page Panel chrome is Desk-only today.
